title: The Water Footprint Lab website is live
body: We've launched this site to share our research, publications, and openings. More projects and team profiles are on the way — check back often.

title: Welcome to our Ph.D. students
body: The lab welcomes Habtamu Tamiru, Mahlet Melaku, Betelhem Demeke, Fitsume Teshome, and Swatantra Sharma. We're glad to have you on the team.
